name: Nano-witch
description: A technomancer who channels nanite swarms to bend reality. Half machine, half mystic, entirely unpredictable.
classAbility: Nanograms: Start with one random nanogram app. Test Presence DR10 to invoke it. On a failure, suffer a glitch.
notes: Cannot invoke nanograms while wearing heavy armor.

name: Street punk
description: Born in the gutter, raised by violence. Your body is a weapon and you know how to use every dirty trick.
classAbility: Brawler: When fighting unarmed or with improvised weapons, deal d6 damage. Agility tests in combat reduced by 2 DR.

name: Wetware hacker
description: Your mind is a weapon, your body a socket. You crack systems, steal data, and sell it to the highest bidder.
classAbility: Jack in: Once per scene, hack a terminal or electronic lock without tools. Test Presence DR12 or trigger an alarm.

name: Burned-out data courier
description: Once you ran data for the corps. Now you run from them. Fast legs, faster mind, zero loyalty.
classAbility: Sprinter: Movement never triggers opportunity attacks. Once per combat, move twice in the same turn.

name: Class-A android
description: Humanoid chassis, synthetic mind. You feel everything and nothing. Your warranty expired long ago.
classAbility: Synthetic body: Immune to poison and disease. Repairable with Tech tools instead of medicine. Heal d6 HP with one hour of maintenance.
notes: Cannot use consumable stim-packs. Repair requires Tech tools.

name: Drifter
description: No corp, no crew, no home. You wander the urban sprawl surviving on instinct and what you can steal.
classAbility: Survivor: Once per day, reroll any failed test. Must accept the second result.
